title: bidens oerstediana
intro: Bidens oerstediana, also known as the mountain beggarticks, is a perennial plant species belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae) and is native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bidens oerstediana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
